arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -fno-exceptions -fno-unwind-tables -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -DSTACK_SIZE=2048 -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -T /workspaces/mcu-elevator-qemu/standalone.ld --specs=nosys.specs --specs=nano.specs -nostartfiles CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/src/bsp/bsp_uart.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/src/bsp/startup.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/src/os_tasks/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/src/app/elevator_fsm.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/tasks.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/list.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/timers.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/portable/GCC/ARM_CM3/port.c.o CMakeFiles/RTOSDemo.dir/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/portable/MemMang/heap_4.c.o -o RTOSDemo
